title: Fix playing cards code and generate patch

log.context: Fix playing cards code and generate patch

Both compile clean. The patch is at `/tmp/cards-patch.patch` (4764 lines, 40 files).

Here is a summary of what was done:

**What was done:**

**Branch sync:** Extracted all files from the `pr-833` branch tip (commit `db16d4b`) into the working tree. This is a complete rewrite of the playing cards system — the old `CardSystem`/`CardStackSystem`/`CardDeckSystem`/`CardHandSystem` and their components were deleted and replaced with the new `SharedPlayingCardsSystem` partial-class structure.
